problem_addressed: Acute food gaps and immediate hunger
notes: Best for immediate lifesaving response in access-feasible contexts
Works when markets function and households can safely access vendors

intervention: Ready-to-use therapeutic food and nutrition treatment
notes: Requires screening supply chain health worker capacity and follow-up
Supports child nutrition and schooling where schools are functioning
Important for medium-term resilience and local economy support

primary_kpi: People reached vs people in need
notes: Essential where starvation risk is created by blocked access
Malnutrition becomes deadly when disease and poor WASH are present
Useful for affordability-driven hunger and recovery support
